questions: Should the analysis be limited to the hedge accounting models explicitly evidenced in the provided context, even though the context only includes material on net investment hedges and not the broader IFRS 9 fair value hedge and cash flow hedge models?

Is the intragroup dividend receivable connected to a foreign operation such that the issue is intended to be analysed as part of a net investment hedge under IFRIC 16, rather than as a separate intragroup monetary item?
